purpose: Evaluate whether governance agents can design abstract, professional, bounded, reusable, and verifiable agent specs.

architectureDecisionSource: skill agent script MCP provider separation

allowedAbsorption: keeping concrete work in skill/runtime context

scorecardDimensions.passCondition: Name and description make the role trigger clear without reading implementation details.
Capabilities use domain nouns; replacing the name with generic-agent breaks the logic.
Agent has a clear product-flow position and handoff direction.
Loadout slots are abstract and minimal; concrete commands stay run-scoped.
Memory scope and forbidden memory are explicit and bounded.
Agent states what it cannot know or do and routes gaps to GapDecision.
Inputs, outputs, upstream, and downstream are reviewable without oral explanation.
At least one fixture or replay check can fail the agent design.
Runtime projection status is explicit: eligible, needs_probe, or reference_only.
No repo path, file list, ticket, today task, deliverable link, or verify step appears in durable identity.
Dependency project references are content/capability evidence only, never architecture adoption.

intelligenceLayer.purpose: Evaluate whether governance agents can reason their way to a good agent design, not only whether the final spec has the right shape.

scorecardDimensions.passCondition: Trace separates the surface request from the durable capability problem.
Trace cites local/source evidence and treats dependency projects as content evidence only.
Trace compares at least two viable design paths before selecting one.
Trace rejects at least one weak path with a reason, such as generic agent, task-bound agent, script-only, or architecture copy.
Genesis, Artisan, and Prism each contribute a distinct judgment instead of one undifferentiated answer.
Artisan loadout reasoning includes coverage, frequency, cost, ROI, or rejection rationale.
Prism checks claims, anti-slop, and whether evaluation criteria are strong enough.
Final GeneratedAgentSpec is explicitly bound back to the reasoning trace and selected path.
